LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DIEGO ORNELAS' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF JOINT STIPULATION OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE NEXT ITERATION MAY, PREFERABLY, BE (1) A NEW MOTION THAT DOES NOT RELY ON DOCUMENTS FILED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS MOTION, OR (2), IF ONLY A FEW MODIFICATIONS ARE REQUIRED, CONSIST OF SUPPLEMENTARY MATERIAL. A NEW SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT MAY BE NEEDED. A NEW PROPOSED NOTICE WILL BE REQUIRED. ALL FURTHER MOTIONS SHOULD BE NOTICED BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW IN DEPT. 611, AFTER CONTACTING HIS CLERK FOR A HEARING DATE. PAPER COURTESY COPIES ARE REQUIRED. AFTER PRELIMINARY APPROVAL, THE FINAL HEARING WILL ALSO BE BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW IN DEPT. 611. [SEE WORD MINUTE FOR DETAILS]. PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CURTIS E KARNOW, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/CEK)

MOTION / Notice Of Unopposed Motion & Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DIEGO ORNELAS' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class Action Settlement.

The motion is denied without prejudice. The next iteration may, preferably, be (1) a new motion that does not rely on documents filed in connection with this motion, or (2), if only a few modifications are required, consist of supplementary material. A new settlement agreement may be needed. A new proposed Notice will be required. All further motions should be noticed before Judge Karnow in Dept. 611, after contacting his clerk for a hearing date. Paper courtesy copies are required. After preliminary approval, the final hearing will also be before Judge Karnow in Dept. 611.

[see word minute for details].

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)
